commitResults.messageTitle: Add Frequency enum, RecurringTransaction model, and RecurringTransactionList
Add command classes for recurring transactions
Integrate recurring transactions into Parser, main app, and storage
Update help menu with recurring transaction commands
Add tests for recurring transaction feature
Fix PR review issues in recurring transaction feature
commitResults.messageBody:
Critical fixes:
- GenerateRecurringCommand: break with warning on null createTransaction result
  instead of silently advancing lastGeneratedDate for invalid categories
- Storage.parseRecurringLine: remove silent catch(Exception) so malformed
  lines propagate to caller's warn block with the raw line included
- Parser.parseAddCommand: use replaceFirst(" rec/\S+") instead of substring
  to preserve d/ and other tokens that appear after rec/FREQ

Important fixes:
- RecurringTransaction: add transactionType field (income-first priority)
  to resolve misc category ambiguity; validate setLastGeneratedDate input
- GenerateRecurringCommand: pass category.toLowerCase() to Income/Expense
  constructors; replace advance() with Frequency.next() method
- ListRecurringCommand: replace System.out.println(DIVIDER) with
  ui.showMessage(DIVIDER) to respect UI abstraction
- RecurringTransactionList: add clear() method to replace O(n^2) loops
- Storage.loadRecurring: use list.clear(), add category validation on load,
  include raw line in malformed-line warning messages

Test fixes:
- GenerateRecurringCommandTest: rename weeklyTwoWeeksAgo to weeklyOneWeekAgo,
  split runTwice_noDuplicates into two assertions, fix System.setOut leaks
- AddRecurringCommandTest: fix System.setOut leak with try/finally
- ParserTest: add delete-rec error path tests and d/-after-rec/ test
- StorageTest: add loadRecurring/saveRecurring round-trip tests
- Add ListRecurringCommandTest
- Frequency: add next(LocalDate) method, derive fromString from values()

commitResults.messageTitle: fix: suppress startup output, redirect Storage IO, harden parser
commitResults.messageBody:
- GenerateRecurringCommand: skip "no due" message when recurring list
  is empty; prevents spurious stdout during startup that breaks the
  text-UI test diff
- Storage: add Logger, replace all System.out.println warn calls with
  logger.warning so warnings never reach the captured stdout stream
- Parser.parseFrequency: guard blank freqToken with a clear error
  message instead of delegating to Frequency.fromString("")
- GenerateRecurringCommandTest: update empty-list test to assert no
  transactions generated (not a message), matching new behaviour

commitResults.messageTitle: fix: batch gen-rec output into per-template summary
commitResults.messageBody:
Replace per-transaction 'Generated: ...' messages with a single
summary line per template after generation completes:
  'Generated N transaction(s) from: [Recurring] ...'

Prevents terminal flood when generating from templates with long
histories (e.g. daily from 3 years ago = 1000+ lines).

commitResults.messageTitle: docs: add DG section and update UG for recurring transactions
commitResults.messageBody:
Add a full Developer Guide section covering the recurring transactions
feature: RecurringTransaction model, Frequency enum, RecurringTransactionList,
all four commands (add/list/delete/gen-rec), the isMutatingRecurring()
contract, recurring.txt storage format, and auto-generation on startup.
Include design considerations and alternatives considered.

Update the User Guide "Editing the Data File" section to mention both
data files (transactions.txt and recurring.txt).

category validation and template construction.

Add sequence diagram for gen-rec (GenerateRecurringSequenceDiagram) showing

and lastGeneratedDate watermark update.

Wire all three diagrams into the DG recurring transactions section.

commitResults.messageTitle: fix: show original indices in sort output to match delete/edit
commitResults.messageBody:
Sort display previously renumbered items 1..N in sorted order, but
delete and edit used original insertion-order indices — causing users
who picked a number from the sorted view to operate on the wrong item.

- Add TransactionList.getOriginalIndex(Transaction) using identity lookup
- SortCommand now displays each transaction's original list index
- Update UG sort note and document case-insensitive criteria input
- Update SortCommandTest expectations to match new index display

commitResults.messageTitle: fix: prevent rec/ inside desc/ value from hijacking add routing
commitResults.messageBody:
Parser.java used remainder.contains(" rec/") to detect recurring
commands, but this matched rec/ embedded in a desc/ value such as
'add food/10 desc/send rec/today to friend'. The transaction was
incorrectly routed to AddRecurringCommand and failed to add.

Check for rec/ only in the portion of remainder before any desc/ token.
Also fix stale Javadoc on parseDate — it previously claimed the method
returns today's date on invalid input; it actually throws.

commitResults.messageTitle: fix: show clear error when delete-rec is called on empty list
commitResults.messageBody:
When no recurring templates exist, delete-rec produced the nonsensical
message 'between 1 and 0'. Now detects the empty case first and shows
'No recurring transactions to delete.' before the generic range check.

commitResults.messageTitle: fix: gen-rec prints message when no templates are configured
commitResults.messageBody:
gen-rec produced no output when the recurring list was empty, giving
the user no feedback. Now shows 'No recurring transactions configured.'
for an empty list, and keeps 'No recurring transactions are due.' for a
non-empty list where none are due yet.

commitResults.messageTitle: fix: category remove now blocks removal if used by recurring templates
commitResults.messageBody:
CategoryCommand only checked the main TransactionList, allowing
category removal even when a recurring template referenced it. On the
next gen-rec the template would silently fail to generate transactions.

Pass RecurringTransactionList to CategoryCommand and check it in the
remove action before allowing deletion.
Fix more summarycommand flaws and bugs

commitResults.messageTitle: fix: replace em-dash with ASCII hyphen in user-facing messages
commitResults.messageBody:
Em-dash (U+2014) in error and status messages rendered as mojibake
on Windows consoles using code page 1252 (the default on many systems).
Replace with plain ASCII ' - ' in all user-visible strings across
UndoCommand, RedoCommand, and Parser.

commitResults.messageTitle: docs: fix FAQ to list all three data files for transfer
commitResults.messageBody:
The FAQ only mentioned transactions.txt, causing users who followed
it to silently lose custom categories and recurring templates when
transferring data to a new computer. Now lists all three files:
transactions.txt, categories.txt, and recurring.txt.
fix: warn user when corrupted transactions are skipped

commitResults.messageTitle: fix: suppress gen-rec empty message during startup auto-run
commitResults.messageBody:
The startup auto-invocation of gen-rec was now printing 'No recurring
transactions configured.' because the empty list check always showed
a message. Startup should be silent when nothing is generated.

Add a showEmptyMessage flag: startup passes false to stay silent;
user-invoked gen-rec keeps the default (true) to print feedback.
fix: warn user when corrupted transactions are skipped

commitResults.messageTitle: docs: update PPP with beyond-team contributions and UG/DG extracts
commitResults.messageBody:
Add Beyond-Team Contributions section (22 PE-D bug reports), a UG
extract for the Sort command, and a DG extract for the Undo/Redo
feature including sequence and class diagrams.
docs: fix export command examples to use cross-platform paths in UG
docs: add file format reference in ug
Fix budget formatting, validation and delete help text
docs: fix FAQ transfer instructions to include all three data files
Fix portfolio page

commitResults.messageTitle: Trim PPP summary to meet 2-page hard limit
commitResults.messageBody:
Cut per-feature prose to 3 sentences each, replaced verbose DG
contribution sub-bullets with 4 flat lines, removed Tools Used
section, merged Review/Mentoring into Team-Based Tasks with actual
PR links (#84, #85, #88), and removed Alternatives Considered and
Future Improvements from the DG extract. All required PPP elements
are retained.

commitResults.messageTitle: Remove inaccurate About Us claim from team tasks
Remove UG and DG extracts from PPP

commitResults.messageBody: Trim PPP to meet 2-page hard limit
Fix bug where add recurring gets turned into a normal transaction
Fix summary command parsing
